From treadmills to complete gym setups — we keep your fitness equipment running at peak performance with genuine parts and certified technicians.

WHY CHOOSE US

Trusted by 200+ gyms and fitness centers across Bangladesh

90-Day Warranty

Every service backed by our comprehensive 90-day warranty on parts and labor

Certified Technicians

Factory-trained experts with 10+ years of experience in fitness equipment

Quick Turnaround

Most repairs completed within 24-48 hours to minimize your downtime

On-Site Service

We come to you — home, gym, or commercial facility across Bangladesh

Process

Streamlined Service Flow

We've simplified equipment maintenance into four easy steps. From your first call to the final test run, experience hassle-free professional service.

01

Request Service

Submit your service request online or call our support team directly.

02

Expert Diagnosis

Certified technicians assess the issue and provide a transparent quote.

03

Professional Repair

We fix your equipment on-site using genuine manufacturer parts.

04

Quality Assurance

Comprehensive testing ensures peak performance before we leave.

Ready to Restore Your Equipment?

Don't let broken machines slow you down. Book a certified technician today and get your gym back in action.

Book a ServiceContact Us
